director.name: 本杰明·艾恩塞德·柯平 Benjamin Ironside Koppin

introduction: Take a visceral journey into insanity as MADE ME DO IT dives into the supernatural mythology behind your favorite "slasher" characters. Enter the fragmented mind of serial killer Thomas Berkson. After a lifetime of abuse and rejection, Thomas has finally found someone who loves him unconditionally, the evil mask, Barbara. Following her maternal influence, Thomas blindly obeys Barbara's every command as she takes retribution on all those who've hurt her precious boy. Distorting Thomas' mind, she uses him as a vessel for her bidding. Barbara's rage descends on the unsuspecting Ali Hooper, her teenage brother, Nick and her ex-boyfriend Jason. In a throwback to the classic 80's slasher genre, the night twists and turns into a race for survival through an acid trip exploration of Thomas' splintered memory. Coming face to face with the unstoppable force of Barbara, the question is asked who or what is the source of Thomas' power
